CREATE TABLE hosts (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ip_address VARCHAR(15), host_name VARCHAR(255));
SELECT tcpip_gethostbyaddr('10.0.0.1') AS host_name UNION SELECT ip_address FROM hosts WHERE host_name IS NULL;
SELECT tcpip_gethostbyaddr((SELECT ip_address FROM hosts WHERE id = 1)) AS host_name;
SELECT host_name FROM hosts WHERE ip_address = (SELECT ip_address FROM hosts WHERE host_name IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1);
SELECT CASE WHEN tcpip_gethostbyaddr('192.168.1.10') = '192.168.1.10' THEN 'No DNS Entry' ELSE tcpip_gethostbyaddr('192.168.1.10') END AS result;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hosts WHERE ip_address LIKE '192.%' AND tcpip_gethostbyaddr(ip_address) IS NULL;
SELECT ip_address, tcpip_gethostbyaddr(ip_address) FROM hosts WHERE tcpip_gethostbyaddr(ip_address) IS NOT NULL ORDER BY host_name;
SELECT h1.host_name FROM hosts h1 JOIN hosts h2 ON h1.id <> h2.id WHERE tcpip_gethostbyaddr(h1.ip_address) = tcpip_gethostbyaddr(h2.ip_address);
